description: Nominal capital productivity at normal capacity = r/(mu*pi)
Profit share = GOS/GVA (includes TPI in denominator)
Real gross capital accumulation rate = d(ln KGR)
Real net capital accumulation rate = d(ln KNR)
Real output growth rate = d(ln GVA_real)
Net interest share of GOS = NetInt/GOS
d(ln r) — annual log-change in profit rate
